videos.title: Super Bowl 52 - 7  Loppet Cross Country Ski Race on Cedar Lake - SwoopLive Drone Footage
videos.description:
A Loppet Cross Country Ski Race on Cedar Lake in Minneapolis during Super Bowl weekend.
Presented by VA.org and Freetoys.com.

Music: "Heat Haze" by Lee Rosevere

videos.title: 2011 City of Lakes Loppet - Womens Open Sprint Final
videos.description: It was all Caitlin Compton in the womens open sprint final at 2011 City of Lakes Loppet as she lead from start to finish.   Johanna Winters cleaned up with second and Carolyn Bramante nipped Audrey Weber at the line for third.
